category_sources: Official GitHub repository describes Mapcrafter as a high performance Minecraft map renderer.
source_facts.description says mapcrafter is a Minecraft map renderer.
display_name_sources: Official repository and documentation use the capitalized display name Mapcrafter.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README says built documentation is available at docs.mapcrafter.org.
source_facts.homepage points to the official repository that links the documentation site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists mapcrafter rendering and helper commands.
